title: JA Calata learner wins gold, Rhodes bursary at Eskom Expo
description: CRADOCK NEWS - Buhle Hlonela Goniwe (17), a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - Buhle Hlonela Goniwe (17), a learner at JA Calata Senior Secondary School in Lingeligle, Nxuba (Cradock), scored big at the district round of the Eskom Expo for young Scientists, held on 26 July.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - Buhle Hlonela Goniwe (17), a learner at JA Calata Senior Secondary School in Lingeligle, Nxuba (Cradock), scored big at the district round of the Eskom Expo for young Scientists, held on 26 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Not only was he awarded a gold medal and several extra awards; he also received a Rhodes University bursary to the value of R64 000 to study at this institution in 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In an interview with Graaff-Reinet Advertiser upon his return to Nxuba, Goniwe said he only heard about the Eskom Expo for young scientists and the competition in 2024.","html":"In an interview with Graaff-Reinet Advertiser upon his return to Nxuba, Goniwe said he only heard about the Eskom Expo for young scientists and the competition in 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I registered in the Grahamstown region.","html":"\"I registered in the Grahamstown region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unfortunately I didn't win the regional competition last year and I could only bring back a bronze medal.","html":"Unfortunately I didn't win the regional competition last year and I could only bring back a bronze medal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But that was the start of a new personal journey for me. This year I entered the competition again and I was one of the four winners,\" said a happy Goniwe.","html":"But that was the start of a new personal journey for me. This year I entered the competition again and I was one of the four winners,\" said a happy Goniwe."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I was awarded a gold medal and several extra awards and a Rhodes University R64 000 bursary. Now I am moving to the provincial stage of the project, where I will compete with others representing their provinces.\"","html":"\"I was awarded a gold medal and several extra awards and a Rhodes University R64 000 bursary. Now I am moving to the provincial stage of the project, where I will compete with others representing their provinces.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Goniwe's project focused on growing plants using no soil, but using organic nutrient-rich solutions instead.","html":"Goniwe's project focused on growing plants using no soil, but using organic nutrient-rich solutions instead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Goniwe represented the whole Inxuba Yethemba Municipality district as well as his school.","html":"Goniwe represented the whole Inxuba Yethemba Municipality district as well as his school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: JA Calata learner wins gold, Rhodes bursary at Eskom Expo
